apifeatureusage-desc: Haddii aad rabto inaad hesho koobitaanka isticmaalka muuqaalada API ee laga diwangeliyey aaladda uu isticmaalahu ku dhex jiro
apifeatureusage-no-indexes: Ma jiro xog la heli karo mudada taariikhda la cayimay.
apifeatureusage-missing-indexes: Ma jiro xog la heli karo qayb ka mid ah mudada taariikhda la cayimay.
apifeatureusage-deprecation-help: Isticmaal [[Special:ApiFeatureUsage]] si aad u aragto isticmaalka astaamaha duugoobay ee barnaamijkaaga.
